title: MTR Low effort Osaka Metro New 20 Series
description: Low effort Osaka Metro New 20 Series for MTR mod!
body:
# Low effort Osaka Metro New 20 Series
Osaka Metro New 20 Series from retextured R211 from base mod.
![train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de0258deaa99696fb9f2e71c9b18b4027d3746ae_0.webp)
## Liveries
- 21 Series (Midosuji Line)
- 22 Series (Tanimachi Line)
- 23 Series (Yotsubashi Line)
- 24 Series (Chūō Line)
- 25 Series (Sennichimae Line)
## Features
- The train
- New original motor sounds
- Customised interior seats
- Extra Osaka Metro announcement sounds via 'sounds:'
